modules.description: Built-in functions, types, and exceptions — always available
Critical import rules, lib/ prefix trap, and common AI mistakes. READ FIRST.
str/list/dict/bytes/bytearray/int/float/memoryview method availability vs CPython. CRITICAL: AI often uses missing methods.
Core functions: CPU freq, reset, sleep modes, unique_id. See machine-*.json for peripheral classes.
GPIO pin control: input, output, interrupts, pull-up/down
Analog-to-Digital Converter: 12-bit, 0-3.3V, attenuation levels
Digital-to-Analog Converter: 8-bit, GPIO 25/26 only
Pulse Width Modulation: LED brightness, servo control, 8 channels
I2C bus: hardware (2 peripherals) and software (any pins)
SPI bus: hardware (HSPI, VSPI) and software (any pins)
Serial UART: 3 peripherals, hardware flow control, IRQ
Hardware timer: periodic/one-shot callbacks, 4 virtual timers
Real-Time Clock: datetime, RTC memory (survives deep sleep)
Watchdog Timer: auto-reset on hang, feed() to prevent
SD card over SPI: mount as filesystem for storage
Capacitive touch sensor: 10 pins, deep-sleep wake (ESP32 only)
Logical signal: active-low abstraction on top of Pin
I2S audio bus: DAC/ADC, MEMS microphones, amplifiers
Pulse counter using ESP32 PCNT peripheral
Quadrature rotary encoder via ESP32 PCNT
Advanced ADC block configuration and calibration
WLAN (Wi-Fi), LAN (Ethernet), PPP (cellular). STA, AP, security.
ESP32-specific: NVS, RMT, PCNT, wake sources, Partition, ULP, deep sleep
ESP8266/ESP32 shared: flash access, osdebug control
sleep, ticks_ms, ticks_diff (non-blocking timing), epoch 2000
Garbage collector: collect(), mem_free(), mem_alloc(), enable/disable
System info: platform, version, path, print_exception()
Filesystem: listdir, mount, stat, VfsFat, VfsLfs2, uname
JSON encode/decode: dumps, loads. DO NOT use 'ujson'.
Regex: match, search, sub (no fullmatch, no look-ahead). DO NOT use 'ure'.
Binary pack/unpack (no q/Q/d on ESP32)
Random numbers: randint, choice, getrandbits (uses TRNG)
Math: full set including erf, gamma, factorial. 32-bit float.
namedtuple, deque, OrderedDict
HTTP client (mip install requests). get(), post(), json(). DO NOT use 'urequests'.
TCP/UDP sockets, max 536B TCP recv
I/O multiplexing: poll() and select() with POLLIN/POLLOUT/POLLERR
Threading: start_new_thread, Lock (limited stack)
Async I/O: create_task, gather, Lock, Event, open_connection, start_server
Internals: const(), mem_info(), schedule(), alloc_emergency_exception_buf()
WS2812 LED strip control via RMT
Frame buffer drawing for OLED/LCD displays
BLE: GATT server/client, advertising, scanning. DO NOT use 'ubluetooth'.
DHT11/DHT22 temperature and humidity sensors
Dallas 1-Wire bus: DS18B20 and other OneWire devices
NTP time synchronization (requires Wi-Fi)
SHA-256 and MD5 hashing. DO NOT use 'uhashlib'.
Hexadecimal and base64 conversions. DO NOT use 'ubinascii'.
BytesIO and StringIO in-memory streams. DO NOT use 'uio'.
SSL/TLS: wrap_socket, SSLContext, PROTOCOL_TLS/DTLS
AES encryption/decryption. DO NOT use 'ucryptolib'.
ESP-NOW P2P wireless communication between ESP32s
